description: The Cosmopolitan fragrance for men from police is for the polished urban debonair. The fragrance offers a sleek blend of bergamot, lemon, cold spices, mint, ylang-ylang, cedar wood, sandalwood, amber and vanillaQuantity: 100 ml CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
